Title: The BOTA House Garden
Content:
Nestled in the serene suburbs of Spring Valley, The BOTA House Gardens provide the perfect backdrop for all your events. Be enchanted by an amazing outdoor space with unmatched ambience for all your corporate and social events. This  property is hired out exclusively for events and provides the perfect backdrop for both corporate functions and special celebrations.

All events at BOTA House are booked on an exclusive use basis, giving you access to the entire garden for the duration of your event. The garden can accommodate up to 150 pax.

Title: The BOTA House Meeting Room
Content:
The BOTA House is a stunning venue nestled in Spring Valley, a picturesque 1-acre property in the most sought-after address in Nairobi. This  property is a members’ only co-working space that can be hired exclusively for meetings & events and provides the perfect backdrop for both corporate functions and special celebrations.

All events at BOTA House are booked on an exclusive use basis, giving you access to the entire property for the duration of your meeting.  The meeting rooms are elegant architecturally designed indoor spaces featuring bespoke fittings and bold vibrant interiors and colors. Their customizable menu options showcase exceptional local produce and can be tailored to suit any meeting style. Choose from rustic grazing tables, substantial canapés, beautiful banquets, and alternate plated mains.

Title: Amwaj Seafront
Content:
Perfectly perched  on the shores of the Indian Ocean at Tudor, Mombasa, Amwaj Seafront Venue is the ideal choice for most events in Mombasa. It features airy light filled floor to ceiling windows offering unrivalled views of the Indian Ocean at the creek. Whether you’re planning a relaxed waterfront wedding, corporate function, cocktail party, or birthday dinner, Amwaj Seafront can accommodate you with its versatile open-plan floor layouts. Hire the entire space exclusively for larger events or host an intimate celebration in the semi-private garden.

It can accommodate up to 450 pax.

Title: Wempa Garden
Content:
Ever dreamed of tying the knot amongst a picturesque garden backdrop? Zamani Za Kale could be the perfect place for you! Combining rustic charm and seamless modern service, this enchanting Kabati – Kenol venue is perfect for hosting relaxed garden events.

If you’re planning a multi-day event, corporate retreat or destination weekend wedding, the venue has 2 guest rooms on-site that can sleep up to five. As the celebrations come to an end, and the party starts to wind down, you will love the convenience of retiring to the beautiful accommodation at the estate.

Title: The Terrace at LaunchPad
Content:
Tired of stuffy corporate venues? Looking for somewhere a little more laidback for your next office party? Then LaunchPad’s  bright and airy terrace  could be the perfect solution. Overlooking Westland’s urban skyline, this venue is , perfect for everything from staff Christmas parties and awards nights to fundraising events and product launches.

The venue seats up to 150 people, and provides customizable catering options with a varied menu including a range of gourmet dishes for you and your entourage to enjoy. The experienced team at LaunchPad understand the importance of attention to detail when helping you plan your special event. These dedicated professionals have curated hundreds of incredible events and will provide impeccable service to ensure that your day runs smoothly, from start to finish.

Title: Karen Village Bishop Court
Content:
Karen Village is located in Kerarapon along Ngong Road, 3KM from Karen Shopping Centre. It is a uniquely curated space meant to foster both community and innovation with the design incorporating specific elements that not only enhance the ambience but also boost creativity.

The Bishops Court  is  a double-storey building dedicated to all bishops in Kenya since 1884. The space is inspired by Swahili interiors and furniture which boasts of fine workmanship and intimate detailing. The wood in the railings, floors and doors was sourced from Mombasa and is over 160 years old. The Bishops Court is designed specifically for artistic gatherings and/or for use as a gallery. It accommodates up to 100 people and is available for both intimate and large ceremonies.

Title: TuWork Co-Working Nairobi
Content:
TuWork is a premium coworking space in Lavington, Nairobi, designed for freelancers, startups, SMEs, and remote teams looking for a professional, collaborative, and inspiring work environment. We offer flexible workspaces, private offices, meeting rooms, and event spaces tailored to support productivity and business growth.

TuWork offers a variety of work and event spaces to suit different professional needs including coworking spaces, private offices and meeting rooms accommodating between 4 – 15 pax ideal for corporate meetings, boardrooms, and video conferencing

Amenities & Features

  • High-speed Wi-Fi & power backup
  • 24/7 secure access for private offices
  • Meeting rooms with video conferencing
  • Outdoor breakout areas & terrace bar
  • Mail & package handling services
  • Complimentary tea, coffee & filtered water
  • On-site café & catering options available
  • Ample parking & professional front desk support

Title: Rock House Manor
Content: Rock House Manor is strategically located in the exclusive Karen Hardy area in Nairobi. In tune with the name, Rock House has been modeled by a local artist/architect to reflect the owner’s origins on the slopes of Mt Kenya and their passion for nature’s captivating sceneries. The landscaped gardens are intentionally structured to bring out the ambience of a mountain environment and a large-scale replica of Mt Kenya in our grounds offers an informative route planner if intending to hike the mountain.

Content:
Lymack Suites & Gardens  main garden features a large pristinely manicured lawn with a variety of lush trees and flowers ideal for larger events with a capacity of up to 1,000 people.

Restaurant & Cafe

With ingredients sustainably grown and sourced from farms we trust including our very own small family farm, our farm-to-table restaurant provides a fresh and wholesome culinary experience across various cuisines. Title: A.S.K. Dome
Content:
The Dome is a premier full-service Meeting & Entertainment facility that is poised to re-define the entertainment, meetings and events industry with its unrivalled capacity and elegance. The facility boasts a much-needed capacity of up to 5,000 guests alongside cutting-edge technology, high speed internet, and audio-visual equipment’s expected of a world class facility. The Dome features a 3,400 sqm indoor hall with a fully fitted kitchen and state of the art lavatories and 5 meeting rooms.

As one of the largest indoor spaces in the region, its multifunctionality and various facilities makes it perfect for hosting major exhibition, conferences, summits, sports and social occasions or the coziest boardroom meetings. With a net floor of 4,500 sqm, The Dome can host more than 5,000 delegates at a time and contains facilities for businesses, leisure and events.

Gastronomical Facilities

A wide variety of gastronomical facilities are offered to the guests such as exclusive Business Class Lounges, Rooftop Bar & a World Class Gourmet Kitchen that provides a unique mix of sophistication and casual design.

Title: Simba Corp Show Room
Content:
The Simba Corp Centre, Westlands is the ultimate choice for meetings, conferences, and events. The showroom is a world-class, purpose-built venue created to offer a captivating first impression. With  fully accessible multi-purpose spaces ranging from Fika Lounge to the VIP Rooms, it offers versatility and grandeur in equal measure. Renowned for exceptional customer service and catering, this iconic venue is committed to delivering excellence in every respect.

The dedicated sales and events team simplifies the planning process, providing a dedicated event manager to assist with every last detail. Whether envisioning an intimate dinner or a large-scale conference with exhibition space, Simba Corp Showroom has you covered. Book Now for your next event and experience the seamless blend of substantial spaces, a central location, and exceptional facilities.

Title: A.S.K. Dome Meeting Room
Content:
The Dome features a 3,400 sqm indoor hall with a fully fitted kitchen and state of the art lavatories and 5 meeting rooms seating up to 50 pax per room. The state-of-the-art meeting rooms are ideal for business meetings and strategic discussions, offering a professional atmosphere bathed in natural light and tasteful decor.

Equipped with a well-appointed conference table, ergonomic chairs, high-definition projector, seamless video conferencing, and high-speed internet, it supports impactful presentations and global connectivity. Every detail, from modern lighting to climate control, is designed for effective collaboration and strategic planning. A dedicated support team is available to assist with technical needs and special requests, ensuring your event runs smoothly from start to finish.

Title: Nairobi Street Kitchen
Content:
Whether it’s for a special celebration, drinks with friends, or a business lunch, the eclectic collection of Nairobi Street Kitchen  bars, entertainment spaces and restaurants set the perfect mood for any occasion.

Dine in a colorful Mumbai-inspired bus or sip your way through the celebrated wine regions of Portugal; unwind to local live bands, shop from artisan vendors, or enjoy a craft cocktail with rooftop views of bustling Westlands – whatever your vibe is, NSK have curated over 11 unique zones providing you with a myriad of exciting experiences at each and every visit.

The Social Rooftop Bar is an iconic rooftop patio where guests come to unwind with a handcrafted signature cocktail, karaoke it out with local live bands, or catch up on all the big games with their friends and fellow fans. As evening progresses, the lights are dimmed, the music pulses through the air, and you can dine and drink to your heart’s content.

Title: Bethsaida Park, Kikuyu
Content:
The charm of this lush, abundantly-green, tucked-away space, can’t be overstated. Bethsaida Park is located alongside the iconic Wattle House in Kikuyu amidst old growth trees and the abundant bird life offering a soothing natural soundtrack.

Whether you prefer a secluded spot or  a spacious green lawn, you will find the perfect place for every part of your event. For your reception, you can continue to enjoy the beauty of nature in one of the outdoor areas, or for late night revelry, move to the Wattle House, a charming barn style indoor space making it ideal for an intimate and cozy celebration.

Title: The Living Rooms, Ngara
Content:
The Living Rooms  is a day-to-night social club and experiential gathering space for art, fashion, music, and meaningful connections. The venue features a coffee and cocktail bar, a rooftop terrace open to the public immersed alongside a live exhibition gallery, visual installations, and a space for curated creative and cultural events and experiences.

Framed by the historic neighborhood of Ngara, the Living Rooms combines landmark architecture with a nationally significant art collection to create an exceptional environment for unforgettable events. Catering is managed by The Geco café delivering a standard of hospitality that meets the expectations of discerning guests.

Title: Lymack Suites Rooftop
Content:
Lymack Suites & Gardens famous open rooftop gardens sit atop the 6-storey building providing scenic breathtaking views. Ideal for medium to large events with a capacity of approximately 300 people. The side gardens on the ground floor are ideal for smaller events with a capacity of approximately 50-100 people.

Restaurant & Café

With ingredients sustainably grown and sourced from local farms, the farm-to-table restaurant provides a fresh and wholesome culinary experience across various cuisines. Enjoy a range of hot and cold beverages including Lymack’s own coffee with an assortment of cakes and pastries to soothe your sweet tooth.

Title: Saraya Nairobi Kitchen Lab
Content:
Saraya Nairobi Kitchen Lab is a fully equipped commercial kitchen with best in class food hygiene products. Saraya Nairobi Kitchen Lab has all verified regulatory food & liquor-related licenses. The staff is ready to help with training & adherence to local food hospitality regulations in the local market.

 

  • Start your Pop up restaurant

You can skip the hustle and bustle of opening a commercial restaurant and kitchen in the heart of Nairobi. Operate your dream restaurant at a fraction of the cost of investment, get genuine customer feedback in the market place & get exposed to best in class food hygiene practices essential for your growth in the food industry business.

  • Perfect for Private Brunches/Lunches/Dinners

Are you looking for the perfect space to have your next intimate party? Our central location, comfortable seating, spacious & stylish interior and terrace & customizable menu flexibility for up to 40 guests will give you a chance to create memories to remember.

 

  • Cooking demos at a commercial setup

Commercialize your cooking skills with one of a kind cooking demos. The open-plan kitchen provides an opportunity to easily conduct cooking lessons with commercial equipment.

  • A beautiful setup for your perfect photo & video blog

Take photos fit for Instagram or host nail-biting cooking shows for product placement, photo & video blogs or any other food love story you can create at the Saraya Nairobi Kitchen Lab.

Title: BroadWalk Banquet Hall
Content:
Broadwalk Residency offers a variety of versatile venues to accommodate your meetings and events with style and sophistication. The state-of-the-art ballroom has been meticulously designed to provide a grand setting ideal for weddings, banquets, and corporate events, featuring  décor and ample space for guests.

With a capacity to accommodate up to 800 guests for cocktail functions or corporate events, the expansive venue offers a grand and versatile space suitable for a variety of special occasions. Whether you’re planning a glamorous gala, a corporate conference, or a milestone celebration, the ballroom provides the perfect backdrop for your event. Impeccably designed with attention to detail, the ballroom boasts stunning architecture, exquisite décor, and state-of-the-art facilities, ensuring a truly unforgettable experience for you and your guests. From intimate gatherings to lavish affairs, the Broadwalk Ballroom sets the stage for moments of distinction and celebration.

Full Hall (Size – 1954sqm) = $3,000

Title: Namba 35, Lavington
Content:
Namba 35 is located on Jacaranda Ave in Lavington, Nairobi offering a truly unique setting amongst thriving plant life and well manicured lawns. A beautiful spot in every season, this quaint property invites a seamless flow of mingling and conversation and accommodates up to 70 guests — perfect for your intimate gatherings and soirées.

By exploring the path through the natural landscape, you will enjoy stunning views of the lush greenery; the outdoor garden fountain on the property as well as an established banana plantation. This space has a lot of opportunities for photoshoots in every aesthetically designed space, both inside and out, and can accommodate any type of meeting, workshop, or retreat comfortably.

Notes from the Host

  • No alcohol or smoking is permitted on the premises
  • No loud P.A. systems; reduced noise policy applies at all times
  • No nudity or shooting explicit content
  • Limited parking available. Parking outside the designated area will be at the guest’s risk
  • No cooking or lighting up fire points within the premises.
